title: Emerald tools And armour
description: This mod adds emerald tools and armour to your game! Also there is a special crown...
body:
### **🌿 Emerald Tools & Armor Mod 🌿**

Emeralds have always been one of Minecraft’s most beautiful and valuable resources – but outside of trading, they never had much purpose. This mod changes that by giving emeralds the power they deserve!

With this mod installed, you can craft a full set of emerald tools, armor, and a unique crown, turning those green gems into useful gear that fits naturally into the Minecraft progression system.

## **🔹 Features:**

**🗡️ Emerald Tools**

Craftable sword, pickaxe, axe, shovel, and hoe.

Balanced to be comparable to diamond, but not stronger – making them a fair and fun alternative.

Perfect for players who love the emerald aesthetic and want more variety in their gear choices.
**
🛡️ Emerald Armor**

Full set of emerald armor that offers solid protection without overshadowing diamond.

Designed to look stylish and unique while keeping the survival experience balanced.

**👑 The Emerald Crown**

A special, one-of-a-kind item that cannot be compared to any other helmet.

While worn, it grants the player infinite Hero of the Village I – villagers will forever see you as their champion!

Useful for trading runs, village protection, or simply roleplaying as the true ruler of the villagers.

**💡 Why This Mod?**

Vanilla emeralds are great for trading, but this mod finally gives them a new purpose in survival gameplay. Instead of stacking up unused emeralds, you can now forge them into tools, armor, and even a crown fit for a king. It’s balanced, fun, and integrates smoothly into Minecraft’s progression.

If you’ve ever wanted emeralds to be more than just for trading – this mod is for you!
